dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requests 'high of the past 40 days' which is a 40-day highest high. The Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper) is the standard technical indicator for this (highest high over a lookback period, typically 20 days). Since 40-day Donchian is not in the allowed list, dc_upper (20-day) was used as the closest available proxy. For AUTHOR_SILENT exit, applied a reasonable reversal: exit when price breaks below the Donchian lower band (opposite of entry condition).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requests 'high of the past 40 days' which is a 40-day highest high. The Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper) is the standard technical indicator for this (highest high over a lookback period, typically 20 days). Since 40-day Donchian is not in the allowed list, dc_upper (20-day) was used as the closest available proxy. For AUTHOR_SILENT exit, applied a reasonable reversal: exit when price breaks below the Donchian lower band (opposite of entry condition).

source_rule_text: Buy when today's high exceeds the high of the past 40 days.
